title: Andrew Ellis
summary: The former Speaker who becomes President during the crisis, is rescued from the True Sons and is later exposed as a Black Tusk collaborator.

claims.text: The official story recap identifies Ellis as the former Speaker of the House and missing President held by the True Sons at Capitol Hill.
Ellis was working with Black Tusk, took the broad-spectrum antiviral and was later extracted by the faction from Camp White Oak.

paragraphs.text: Ellis first appears to be a rescue objective and source of the encryption key needed to reach the antiviral. His cooperation with Black Tusk turns that recovery into a betrayal and a later pursuit at Camp White Oak.

verification.notes: Later seasonal developments involving Ellis are outside this first campaign-and-Episode-1 record.
